examples.sentence: 宿題をしてからでないと、遊びに行けません。
examples.translation: You cannot go play until you’ve finished your homework.
examples.translationEn: You cannot go play until you’ve finished your homework.
examples.romaji: Shukudai o shite kara denai to, asobi ni ikemasen.

examples.sentence: 食事をしてからでないと、デザートを食べられません。
examples.translation: You cannot eat dessert until after having a meal.
examples.translationEn: You cannot eat dessert until after having a meal.
examples.romaji: Shokuji o shite kara denai to, dezāto o taberaremasen.

examples.sentence: チケットを買ってからでないと、映画を見られません。
examples.translation: You can’t watch the movie until after you buy a ticket.
examples.translationEn: You can’t watch the movie until after you buy a ticket.
examples.romaji: Chiketto o katte kara denai to, eiga o miraremasen.

examples.sentence: 試験が終わってからでないと、休みを取れません。
examples.translation: You can’t take time off until the exam is over.
examples.translationEn: You can’t take time off until the exam is over.
examples.romaji: Shiken ga owatte kara denai to, yasumi o toremasen.

examples.sentence: 勉強してこそ、テストに合格できる。
examples.translation: Only when you study can you pass the test.
examples.translationEn: Only when you study can you pass the test.
examples.romaji: Benkyō shite koso, tesuto ni gōkaku dekiru.

examples.sentence: 素直になってこそ、相手の気持ちが分かります。
examples.translation: Only when you’re honest can you understand the other person’s feelings.
examples.translationEn: Only when you’re honest can you understand the other person’s feelings.
examples.romaji: Sunao ni natte koso, aite no kimochi ga wakarimasu.

examples.sentence: 静かでこそ、心が落ち着く。
examples.translation: Only in silence can one’s mind be at peace.
examples.translationEn: Only in silence can one’s mind be at peace.
examples.romaji: Shizuka de koso, kokoro ga ochitsuku.

examples.sentence: 友達でこそ、お互いに助け合うのは当然だ。
examples.translation: Precisely because we’re friends, it’s natural to help each other.
examples.translationEn: Precisely because we’re friends, it’s natural to help each other.
examples.romaji: Tomodachi de koso, otagai ni tasukeau no wa tōzen da.

examples.sentence: 今日は暇で(は)しょうがない。
examples.translation: I’m extremely bored today.
examples.translationEn: I’m extremely bored today.
examples.romaji: Kyō wa hima de shō ga nai.

examples.sentence: 試験が近いから不安でしょうがない。
examples.translation: I’m so anxious because the exam is coming up.
examples.translationEn: I’m so anxious because the exam is coming up.
examples.romaji: Shiken ga chikai kara fuan deshō ga nai.

examples.sentence: 頭が痛くてしょうがないから、早退したい。
examples.translation: My head hurts so much I can’t stand it—I want to leave early.
examples.translationEn: My head hurts so much I can’t stand it—I want to leave early.
examples.romaji: Atama ga itakute shō ga nai kara, sōtai shitai.

examples.sentence: 新しいゲームが気になってしょうがない。
examples.translation: I can’t help but keep thinking about the new game.
examples.translationEn: I can’t help but keep thinking about the new game.
examples.romaji: Atarashii gēmu ga ki ni natte shō ga nai.

examples.sentence: この暑さは本当に暑くてたまらない。
examples.translation: This heat is absolutely unbearable.
examples.translationEn: This heat is absolutely unbearable.
examples.romaji: Kono atsusa wa hontō ni atsukute tamaranai.

examples.sentence: 彼女のことが好きでたまらない。
examples.translation: I like her so much I can hardly stand it.
examples.translationEn: I like her so much I can hardly stand it.
examples.romaji: Kanojo no koto ga suki de tamaranai.

examples.sentence: この部屋は寒くてたまらない。
examples.translation: This room is unbearably cold.
examples.translationEn: This room is unbearably cold.
examples.romaji: Kono heya wa samukute tamaranai.

examples.sentence: 彼の態度を見ていると、腹が立ってたまらない。
examples.translation: Seeing his attitude makes me extremely angry.
examples.translationEn: Seeing his attitude makes me extremely angry.
examples.romaji: Kare no taido o mite iru to, hara ga tatte tamaranai.

examples.sentence: 彼の演技が素晴らしくてならない。
examples.translation: I can’t help but be amazed at his wonderful performance.
examples.translationEn: I can’t help but be amazed at his wonderful performance.
examples.romaji: Kare no engi ga subarashikute naranai.

examples.sentence: 合格発表が気になってならない。
examples.translation: I can’t stop worrying about the exam results.
examples.translationEn: I can’t stop worrying about the exam results.
examples.romaji: Gōkaku happyō ga ki ni natte naranai.

examples.sentence: 友達が引っ越してしまって、寂しくてならない。
examples.translation: My friend moved away, and I feel unbearably lonely.
examples.translationEn: My friend moved away, and I feel unbearably lonely.
examples.romaji: Tomodachi ga hikkoshite shimatte, sabishikute naranai.

examples.sentence: 初めての海外旅行で、不安でならない。
examples.translation: It’s my first trip abroad, and I’m extremely anxious.
examples.translationEn: It’s my first trip abroad, and I’m extremely anxious.
examples.romaji: Hajimete no kaigai ryokō de, fuan de naranai.

examples.sentence: いつも助けてもらってばかりはいられない。
examples.translation: I can’t just keep letting people help me all the time.
examples.translationEn: I can’t just keep letting people help me all the time.
examples.romaji: Itsumo tasukete moratte bakari wa irarenai.

examples.sentence: 好きな仕事ばかりしてはいられない。
examples.translation: I can’t afford to only do the work I love.
examples.translationEn: I can’t afford to only do the work I love.
examples.romaji: Suki na shigoto bakari shite wa irarenai.

examples.sentence: 親に頼ってばかりはいられない。
examples.translation: I can’t keep depending on my parents forever.
examples.translationEn: I can’t keep depending on my parents forever.
examples.romaji: Oya ni tayotte bakari wa irarenai.

examples.sentence: 休んでばかりはいられない。仕事もしなくちゃ。
examples.translation: I can’t just keep taking breaks; I have work to do as well.
examples.translationEn: I can’t just keep taking breaks; I have work to do as well.
examples.romaji: Yasunde bakari wa irarenai. Shigoto mo shinakucha.

examples.sentence: 彼は優秀な学生ではないか。
examples.translation: Isn’t he an excellent student?
examples.translationEn: Isn’t he an excellent student?
examples.romaji: Kare wa yūshū na gakusei de wa nai ka.

examples.sentence: この料理は美味しいではないか。
examples.translation: Isn’t this dish delicious?
examples.translationEn: Isn’t this dish delicious?
examples.romaji: Kono ryōri wa oishii de wa nai ka.

examples.sentence: あなたは彼女の友達ではないか。
examples.translation: Aren’t you her friend?
examples.translationEn: Aren’t you her friend?
examples.romaji: Anata wa kanojo no tomodachi de wa nai ka.

examples.sentence: 明日は休みではないか。
examples.translation: Tomorrow’s a day off, right?
examples.translationEn: Tomorrow’s a day off, right?
examples.romaji: Ashita wa yasumi de wa nai ka.

examples.sentence: ここでタバコを吸ってはならない。
examples.translation: You must not smoke here.
examples.translationEn: You must not smoke here.
examples.romaji: Koko de tabako o sutte wa naranai.

examples.sentence: 秘密を他人に話してはならない。
examples.translation: You cannot reveal this secret to others.
examples.translationEn: You cannot reveal this secret to others.
examples.romaji: Himitsu o tanin ni hanashite wa naranai.

examples.sentence: この部屋に入ってはならない。
examples.translation: You must not enter this room.
examples.translationEn: You must not enter this room.
examples.romaji: Kono heya ni haitte wa naranai.

examples.sentence: 飲酒運転をしてはならない。
examples.translation: You must not drink and drive.
examples.translationEn: You must not drink and drive.
examples.romaji: Inshu unten o shite wa naranai.
